description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in Open Business Management (OBM) 1.0.3 pl1 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the (1) new_order and (2) order_dir parameters to (a) index.php, (b) group/group_index.php, (c) user/user_index.php, (d) list/list_index.php, and (e) company/company_index.php, and the (3) entity and (4) tf_dateafter parameter to company/company_index.php.
